title: SubtitleFactory
description: AssetFactory implementation that parses WebVTT (`.vtt`) and SubRip (`.srt`) subtitle files and produces an array of VTTCue instances. Format is detected from the file extension of the response URL; unknown extensions default to VTT parsing. VTT cue settings (`align`, `line`, `position`, `size`, `vertical`) are applied; SRT cues retain default positional properties.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: AssetFactory implementation that parses WebVTT (`.vtt`) and SubRip (`.srt`) subtitle files and produces an array of VTTCue instances.

Format is detected from the file extension of the response URL; unknown extensions default to VTT parsing. VTT cue settings (`align`, `line`, `position`, `size`, `vertical`) are applied; SRT cues retain default positional properties.

members.name: create
members.description: Parses the subtitle text into an ordered array of VTTCue instances.

members.name: createObjectUrl
members.description: Creates an object URL from blob and registers it for automatic cleanup when destroy is called. Prefer this over calling URL.createObjectURL directly inside a factory subclass so the URL is always tracked.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Revokes every object URL that was created via createObjectUrl and clears the internal tracking pool.

members.name: process
members.description: Reads the response body as UTF-8 text and records the subtitle format derived from the response URL's file extension.

members.name: storageName
members.description: Identifier used as the object-store / storage-namespace key when this factory's assets are persisted to a CacheStore.
